quality_note: Authority and completion matrix. This is a control layer, not a claim that unprocessed works have been decoded.

external_authority_baselines.label: Wikipedia bibliography and patent examples
external_authority_baselines.use: Initial public checklist only; every entry needs primary-source verification.

external_authority_baselines.label: Open Library author record
external_authority_baselines.use: Edition and Internet Archive identifier cross-checking.

summary.completion_rule: Steinmetz completion requires every critical work to be either processed with visible custody or explicitly deferred with a public reason; patents require a separate authority pass beyond the seeded examples.

critical_frontier.title: On the Law of Hysteresis
critical_frontier.why_it_matters: Foundational source for Steinmetz's hysteresis law, magnetic loss, and the later Steinmetz equation.
critical_frontier.repo_action: Acquire a primary scan or publisher PDF, then OCR, page-map, extract equations and hysteresis diagrams, and promote only scan-checked claims.
next_actions: Acquire primary scan, publisher PDF, or public page-image source.
Create raw custody manifest, OCR, page map, candidate equations, figures, concepts, glossary, and quotes.

critical_frontier.title: Complex Quantities and Their Use in Electrical Engineering
critical_frontier.why_it_matters: Flagship source for complex quantities, the symbolic method, and early phasor engineering.
critical_frontier.repo_action: Acquire and verify against the Proceedings scan. Do not use Scribd or forum PDFs as custody copies until they match the primary proceedings.
next_actions: Acquire primary scan, publisher PDF, or public page-image source.
Create raw custody manifest, OCR, page map, candidate equations, figures, concepts, glossary, and quotes.

critical_frontier.title: Lightning Phenomena in Electric Circuits
critical_frontier.why_it_matters: Primary lightning, surge, impulse, and high-voltage transient source.
critical_frontier.repo_action: Acquire scan/PDF and feed the lightning-surges concept page, equation queue, and diagram archive.
next_actions: Acquire primary scan, publisher PDF, or public page-image source.
Create raw custody manifest, OCR, page map, candidate equations, figures, concepts, glossary, and quotes.

critical_frontier.title: The General Equations of the Electric Circuit
critical_frontier.why_it_matters: Bridge between symbolic method, differential equations, transients, and general circuit theory.
critical_frontier.repo_action: Acquire the article and link it to Electric Circuits and Transient Electric Phenomena.
next_actions: Acquire primary scan, publisher PDF, or public page-image source.
Create raw custody manifest, OCR, page map, candidate equations, figures, concepts, glossary, and quotes.

critical_frontier.title: Mechanical Forces in Magnetic Fields
critical_frontier.why_it_matters: High-value source for force, stress, pressure, and tension language in magnetic fields.
critical_frontier.repo_action: Acquire scan/PDF, then build the field-force dossier and keep ether-field readings labeled as interpretation.
next_actions: Acquire primary scan, publisher PDF, or public page-image source.
Create raw custody manifest, OCR, page map, candidate equations, figures, concepts, glossary, and quotes.

critical_frontier.title: Outline of Theory of Impulse Currents

next_actions: Acquire primary scan, publisher PDF, or public page-image source.
